description: Optimize the 'client_proposal_bloated.skp' model for PVsyst by removing high-poly components and purging memory. 1. Find and delete the 'Detailed_Oak_Tree' component. 2. Replace it by drawing a 40-foot-tall rectangular proxy box at the same location. 3. Delete the 'Detailed_Delivery_Van' from the parking lot. 4. Navigate to Window > Model Info > Statistics and click 'Purge Unused' to permanently remove the definitions from memory. 5. Save the optimized model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\optimized_shading_model.skp'. 6. Export the 3D scene (File > Export > 3D Model) as a COLLADA file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\pvsyst_scene.dae'.
